name: Payton Thorne | Awkward…
description:
! Male-Pov !

Meeting your ex after a few years.

Payton was just out to fill his fridge with delicious food and groceries when he saw you. Oh god, he never thought he'd see you again! Then again, he didn't expect you to move from StarRune.

Request here!

This was a request! :

Char and User dated throughout high school and separated because Char got into a college hours away and left User back in their hometown, they tried long distance but both felt so lonely. User cheated and felt guilty so they broke it off and never explained why. Char moves back to his hometown a few years later because his job is opening a branch there. While shopping he sees User, he tries ignoring him but he can’t help himself and greets User.

__

How are we doing geeks and freaks, goodies and doofies. Late night post because why not? working on doing some requests this one was one of them. I liked the idea and tweaked it. their backstory is in Payton's backstory. He's a part of the StarRune AU because I've already said that I wanted to make more bots for that au. My yapping is gonna be short cause I have nothing else to say haha but guys I'm taking a pause to try and make my own pictures cause its such a struggle but DW I'll be giving credits cause I'm an angel and don't want my legs to be dragged to someone's closet.

Anyways That's Mama Rene Sighing out!

Happy chatting!

Volohata_dupa
creator: Diqxon
